specification.minimum:
Minimum:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS: Windows 10 or Higher
  • Processor: Intel core I7-4790 / Ryzen 3 3100
  • Memory: 16 GB RAM
  • Graphics: Nvidia Geforce RTX 2070
  • DirectX: Version 12
  • Storage: 18 GB available space
  • VR Support: Not Supported
  • Additional Notes: IMPORTANT: This game requires hardware ray tracing for proper lighting and atmosphere. The game might run on a GTX 1060, but only on the lowest possible settings. This will lead to the whole scene being super bright, which will break immersion. It also supports all major controllers via Steam Input. Please note that certain puzzles require mouse interaction. By default, Steam Input often maps L1/R1 (Left/Right Bumper) to Mouse Scroll Up/Down. This mapping does not work correctly in the game. We recommend remapping these buttons to alternative keys in the Steam Input settings for the best experience.
specification.recommended:
Recommended:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS: Windows 10 or Higher
  • Processor: Intel Core I7-10700 / Ryzen 7 3700X
  • Memory: 32 GB RAM
  • Graphics: Nvidia Geforce RTX 3070 TI
  • DirectX: Version 12
  • Storage: 18 GB available space
  • VR Support: Not Supported
  • Additional Notes: IMPORTANT: This game requires hardware ray tracing for proper lighting and atmosphere. The game might run on a GTX 1060, but only on the lowest possible settings. This will lead to the whole scene being super bright, which will break immersion. It also supports all major controllers via Steam Input. Please note that certain puzzles require mouse interaction. By default, Steam Input often maps L1/R1 (Left/Right Bumper) to Mouse Scroll Up/Down. This mapping does not work correctly in the game. We recommend remapping these buttons to alternative keys in the Steam Input settings for the best experience.
